asset_name: Champion Caster Core Sheet — telegraph, cast, feint, hurt, defeat
shared_properties: The champion keeps a readable upper-class mage silhouette with a staff or casting focus directed toward the lane.
Every pose fits a stable combat root and leaves the face unobscured for telegraph reading.
Cast and feint poses must be distinct enough to support later fake-warning mechanics.
differences: This task covers the generic champion presenter used for the school progression roster.
Elemental projectiles and telegraph rings remain in obstacle tasks.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Moodboard for noble academy fabric contrast and spell-lit facial framing.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player_silhouette
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette board for maintaining opponent scale that still fits inside the enemy podium zone.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_2/character_champion_caster_core_sheet.png during DuelLoading and store the atlas under character_champion_caster_core_sheet.
runtime_notes: Use state ranges for telegraph_idle, spell_cast, fake_cast, hurt, and defeat.
Anchor the champion at x=340 y=265 and leave room above the staff tip for telegraph marker overlays.
Expose the fake_cast range to AI pattern scripts so later champions can reuse the same deception pose family.

context.usage: Enemy champion animation set used for telegraphs, attacks, fake-outs, and defeat feedback across the school ladder.

shape.silhouette: Tall academy champion with layered robe panels, high collar, spell focus, and confident forward lean.

expression_notes: Telegraph idle frames keep the face visible and the focus lifted toward the lane.
Fake cast frames interrupt the full swing with a shorter shoulder arc and a deceptive wrist flick.
Defeat frames collapse the upper torso while preserving the podium contact point.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 560x800px with sixteen 140x200 frames and no padding.
Spell cast and fake cast states are readable as different motions in a side-by-side atlas inspection.
The combat root stays stable across all states so the champion never pops off the podium when animated.
Robe trims and spell focus remain visible over the warm maroon background.
